nasb.text: As each one has received a special gift, employ it in serving one another as good stewards of the manifold grace of God.

esv.text: As each has received a gift, use it to serve one another, as good stewards of God’s varied grace:

cnv.text: 你們要作　神各樣恩賜的好管家，各人照著所領受的恩賜彼此服事。

ccb.text: 按着自己所得的恩赐彼此服侍，做上帝各样恩典的好管家。

csbs.text: 每个人要照着自己所领受的恩赐来彼此服事，做神各种恩典的好管家。
